result.summary: The page is generally usable, but several elements appear clipped or overcrowded, suggesting responsive layout/overflow issues on this viewport.

issues.description: Game cards on the right side are partially cut off in multiple sections. The third column/card is visible only as a narrow slice, which makes the grid look broken and may prevent users from accessing content clearly.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout so cards fit within the viewport, e.g. use two columns on this screen size, reduce card width/gaps, or make the carousel behavior explicit with proper scroll snapping and visible affordances.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right; the 'Hot Games' tab is only partially visible as 'Hot Ga...'. This looks like unintended horizontal overflow or an unfinished carousel.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the tab bar has clear horizontal scrolling behavior, add a fade/scroll indicator, or resize tabs so visible items are not awkwardly cut off.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content area; lower game tiles are partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the page content equal to or greater than the bottom nav height so scrollable content is not obscured.

issues.description: The header area is visually crowded with multiple logos, the location label, hamburger menu, and CTA button competing for space.
issues.suggestion: Consider simplifying or resizing the header elements on smaller screens to improve spacing and reduce visual clutter.
